scripts.build: npm run build:css && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=main.js --minify --platform=node --format=cjs --target=es2020 --external:obsidian --external:electron --external:@codemirror/state --external:@codemirror/view --footer:js="module.exports = module.exports.default || module.exports;"
scripts.release:check: node scripts/version-sync.cjs && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run release:check && npm run release:zip
scripts.e2e: ./scripts/e2e-setup.sh && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE playwright test --grep-invert='interactive recording|Snipsy README demo'
scripts.e2e:headed: ./scripts/e2e-setup.sh && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE playwright test --headed --grep-invert='interactive recording|Snipsy README demo'
scripts.e2e:record: ./scripts/e2e-setup.sh && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE PWDEBUG=1 playwright test e2e/record.spec.ts --headed --timeout=0
scripts.demo:rehearse: ./scripts/e2e-setup.sh && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE DEMO_REHEARSE=1 playwright test e2e/demo/demo.spec.ts --headed --reporter=list --workers=1
